summary.goal: Add POST /battles endpoint with ownership check, idempotency, and Redis queue (closes #12)
decisions: added trainer field to BattleHistory here rather than in the DB issue — it was only discovered as necessary when implementing the idempotency check and the auto-navigate requirement from the plan
used __raw__ $or query for idempotency so both (p1,p2) and (p2,p1) orderings are caught without duplicating application logic
returned 403 (not 404) when a pokemon exists but isn't owned by the requesting user, to distinguish missing resource from authorization failure
